sys_script_include.description:
This script include loads the icons and text messages for Tasker Widgets. This will be updated to include the information for all widgets to improve resusability and standardization across all widgets.
2.8 | 2022-02-25 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel Added Mail16, Phone16 and SendMessage24 2.8 | 2022-02-19 - raj - DFCT0010796 - Tooltip is incorrect on the Org Hier. "Maximize" and "Minimize " iconsDFCT0010796
sys_script_include.name: TaskerWidgetIconsAndMessages
